principles: Select a capability family before selecting a library.
Preserve the target repository's accepted runtime when it satisfies the design contract.
Adapter identity, support, provenance, license, security, and installation facts are owned only by adapter-registry.json.
Cataloging a route never claims that an adapter is installed or available.

families.name: Semantic web UI
families.useWhen: Text, navigation, forms, product workflows, overlays, and accessible components are primary.

families.name: Vector and data visualization
families.useWhen: Charts, diagrams, topology, axes, labels, or inspectable data marks are primary.

families.name: 2D canvas editor
families.useWhen: Selection, transforms, handles, free drawing, object editing, or an infinite canvas is primary.

families.name: 2D scene renderer
families.useWhen: Sprites, particles, filters, shaders, or high object counts need a dedicated scene renderer.

families.name: 2D game engine
families.useWhen: Scenes, cameras, input, audio, physics, game state, assets, and game lifecycle must work together.

families.name: 3D scene renderer
families.useWhen: A custom 3D scene, product visualization, shader work, or WebXR needs rendering primitives rather than a full game engine.

families.name: 3D game and simulation engine
families.useWhen: Physics, animation graphs, scene tooling, input, audio, entities, or simulation lifecycle require an integrated engine.
families.defaultSurface: WebGL or WebGPU with DOM overlay

families.name: Geospatial and globe rendering
families.useWhen: Maps, terrain, globes, tiles, coordinates, or large geospatial datasets are primary.
families.defaultSurface: WebGL or WebGPU with semantic controls

families.name: GPU and shader effects
families.useWhen: Custom material, compute, post-processing, particles, or procedural imagery requires WGSL, GLSL, or a shader graph.

families.name: Narrative and Galgame UI
families.useWhen: Dialogue, choices, backlog, save/load, skip, auto-play, character layers, CG, localization, and input history form the product loop.
families.defaultSurface: Semantic DOM overlay plus optional 2D scene
